market_summary: REGIME: Mixed/Cautious — SPY -1.19% 1m, below MA50 but above MA200 (dd63=-2.58%); QQQ -1.23% 1m, below MA50, mom=+6.84% — tech leadership marginally intact on 90d but near-term distribution continuing. Regime: MIXED, defensive lean with commodities and defense as only clean leadership pockets.

LEADERSHIP: GLD mom=+34.57%, 3m=+20.37%, 6m=+42.05%, 12m=+73.24% — dominant momentum anchor, above both MAs, thesis fully intact. LMT mom=+37.88%, 3m=+49.03%, 6m=+47.74% — cleanest equity momentum name, above both MAs, dd63=-5.23%, FY2025 EPS $21.68 with earnings growth +19.5%, FCF yield ~6.2%, 2026 EPS est $29.75 ramping to $34.74 by 2028. NON-REBALANCE DAY: Rebalance due = false (Day 2 of 7-day minimum cadence; last checkpoint 2026-03-04; next window earliest 2026-03-11). No emergency invalidation conditions triggered. LLY watch continues: mom=+8.68%, 3m=-5.85%, below MA50 ($1047.59) but well above MA200 ($877.17), close=$983.26. XOM slight earnings growth decline (-3.7% TTM) noted but offset by strong momentum and FCF yield. All 8 portfolio holdings retain valid thesis. DO NOTHING.

thesis: NON-REBALANCE DAY: Process discipline enforced. Day 2 post-2026-03-04 rebalance checkpoint; 7-day minimum cadence requires next eligible window no earlier than 2026-03-11. No emergency invalidation conditions breached across any of the 8 holdings.

PORTFOLIO HEALTH STRONG: All 8 holdings show positive momentum composites significantly above SPY benchmark (+6.25%). Rank by momentum: KLAC (+50.45%), TSM (+44.98%), LMT (+37.88%), GLD (+34.57%), XOM (+29.73%), CVX (+22.14%), XLI (+15.74%), LLY (+8.68%). Even weakest name (LLY) retains robust fundamentals — 83% gross margin, ROE 78%+, 2026-2028 EPS growth from $34.66 to $52.14. Qualitative refresh confirms LMT FY2025 earnings growth +19.5%, FCF yield 6.2%; KLAC operating margin 43.3%, ROIC 40.4%, EPS est $36.51→$52.98 FY26-28.

WATCHLIST FOR NEXT REBALANCE (Mar 11+): LLY continues as primary watch — 3m=-5.85%, below MA50, but above MA200 and kill-switch. If momentum does not recover toward MA50 ($1047) by next window, evaluate sizing trim. KLAC dd63=-22.41% elevated — monitor for MA50 reclaim. GLD 1w=-2.38% minor pullback from highs; 3m=+20.37% trend intact above both MAs. No new replacement candidates clear a higher score than current holdings on combined quality+momentum+risk framework.
risks: MACRO: SPY and QQQ both below MA50 — broadening distribution could pressure cyclical names (XOM, CVX, XLI). TLT bid (+2.68% 1m) consistent with rates-rally/growth-scare scenario that would compress energy earnings estimates. Tariff escalation risk could strengthen USD, headwind for GLD and TSM (Taiwan geopolitical premium).

IDIOSYNCRATIC: LLY is the primary watch name — close $983 vs MA50 $1047, 3m=-5.85%, vol20=41.87%. Kill-switch at $960; if breached before next window, emergency review warranted. KLAC dd63=-22.41% — if semiconductor capex guidance weakens, drawdown could extend toward $1250-1300 range (MA200 proxy). LMT 3m=+49% run is extended; any DoD budget news or Ukraine peace resolution could trigger mean reversion.

EXECUTION/LIQUIDITY: No major binary events pre-positioned against. GLD 1w=-2.38% minor pullback — if gold corrects sharply on USD strength (>5% from current $466), the 20% GLD weight is the primary portfolio concentration risk. Cost of doing nothing (zero slippage, zero turnover) clearly exceeds marginal alpha of any tactical adjustment today.

If GLD closes below $430 (~8% from current $466) within 30 days, reduce GLD from 20% to 12-14% at next rebalance — regime shift to risk-on/USD-strength would invalidate safe-haven overweight thesis. Monitor weekly closes.
trade_of_the_day.why_now: Base case: Non-rebalance day, no emergency conditions, process discipline enforced. Portfolio composite momentum (~35% weighted avg) materially exceeds SPY benchmark (+6.25%). Round-trip slippage cost (~30-40bps per trade) exceeds any marginal alpha from tactical adjustment with no thesis damage. Bull case: LMT defense rearmament, KLAC/TSM AI capex cycle, XOM/CVX energy supply tightness, and GLD safe-haven flows all continue to compound. Bear case: Growth scare deepens, SPY breaks MA200, LLY/KLAC drawdowns accelerate — GLD 20% sleeve and XLI/CVX lower-vol positions provide ballast. Expected edge of holding clearly exceeds cost of action; next decision point is 2026-03-11 at earliest.
